harness.description: Harness ids with a managed native-login flow.

profileId.description: Registered config_dir_login profile to log in; absent = the default session.

loginFlow.description: Codex-only: device_auth (default; app-server device-code, isolated browser window), browser_callback (app-server browser-callback opt-in), or browser_redirect (legacy Terminal localhost callback / fallback).

ControlSetupJobCreateRequest.description: Request body to create an exact-subscription native-login job.
